name: Maildramon
description: An Armor-level Cyborg Digimon that evolved through the power of the " Digimental of Miracles ". Possessing armor made of Chrome Digizoid , this dragon is the servant of Knightmon , and rushes about the battlefield carrying Knightmon on its back. As you would expect with the largely-built Knightmon riding it, Maildramon is also an exceptional size, so both its power and stamina are something worth mentioning. It is definitely a " Moving Fortress ". Its Special Move is crushing the opponent under its large build ( Iron Press ).
